title: Denis Mendoza
text: Home * People * Denis Mendoza Denis P. Mendoza [1] Denis P. Mendoza , a Filipino pyroprocessing engineer [2] and as computer chess aficionado and tester interested in chess programming and high performance compiling of engines from source [3] , especially Toga [4] . Denis also served as book author of Gunnar Harms' Bobcat engine. Contents 1 Forum Posts 1.1 2007 ... 1.2 2010 ... 1.3 2020 ... 2 External Links 3 References Forum Posts [ edit ] 2007 ...
